printedText: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Select 2 of your {Supernovas} or {Heart Pirates} type Characters. Swap the base power of the selected Characters with each other during this turn.
[When Attacking] If this Character has 5000 power or more, draw 1 card and K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 3000 base power or less.
This Character cannot be K.O.'d by effects of your opponent's Characters with 5000 base power or less.
If this Character has 5000 power or more, this Character gains [Rush].(This card can attack on the turn in which it is played.)
